description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult human figure with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and torso, giving it a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The head is relatively realistic, with facial features clearly visible, but the neck and arms are stretched unnaturally far from the body. The legs are also elongated and bent in unusual ways, with the feet appearing to merge into the ground or surface. The overall form is reminiscent of a person in motion, but the proportions are extremely exaggerated, creating a sense of fluidity and movement. The surface appears smooth and uniform, with a matte finish and no visible textures or patterns. The figure is dressed in what seems to be a form-fitting outfit, with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A surreal, elongated adult human figure with exaggerated limbs and a realistic head, dressed in a form-fitting outfit and posed in a dynamic, distorted stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, elongated arms extending upward, and the distorted torso and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the stretched neck, with the head in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the elongated arms, and the unusual curvature of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the face, the extended arm, and the twisted lower body.
attribute_posture: dynamically stretched, limbs and torso elongated in a surreal pose
